claims.claim: A first-pass reader has a compact current-state summary.
claims.boundary: summarizes existing evidence and current limitations

claims.claim: The research roadmap is explicit.
claims.boundary: connects public-sample task development to multi-episode data preparation, Qwen3-Omni LoRA, robustness runs, and larger omni-model extensions

claims.claim: The public dataset description is aligned with the official gated Xperience-10M dataset card and public sample card.
claims.boundary: summarizes upstream public metadata, API listing facts, sample license/tooling, and dataset-card facts; does not grant access or mirror raw data

claims.claim: Source facts, sample details, API-listing notes, and project coverage are validated across repo, website, and HF cards.
claims.boundary: offline committed-fact check; does not fetch private gated data

claims.claim: The public Xperience-10M sample has been converted into aligned model windows.
claims.boundary: 5,821 frames, 1,161 windows, one public sample episode

claims.claim: The current feature contract is explicit and inspectable.
claims.boundary: 8,546-dimensional aligned multimodal window representation

claims.claim: The task evaluation protocol is explicit and generated from committed metrics.
claims.boundary: defines windows, split, per-task metrics, leakage controls, and current limitations

claims.claim: The public sample modalities are inspectable without raw data redistribution.
claims.boundary: derived thumbnails for presentation; raw data remains excluded

claims.claim: Public task cards stay readable for non-expert readers.
claims.boundary: presentation integrity for the public task surface

claims.claim: Public figures, charts, and modality thumbnails are indexed as project evidence.
claims.boundary: records derived visual assets, dimensions, hashes, roles, and source scripts; raw Xperience-10M data remains excluded

claims.claim: A project logo is consistently applied across public surfaces.
claims.boundary: generated logo and deterministic derivatives only; no raw dataset data or model weights

claims.claim: The 12 task heads are implemented as scripts with saved metrics and predictions.
claims.boundary: chronological single-episode split, not cross-episode generalization

claims.claim: Minimal and neural heads use the same task contracts.
claims.boundary: small heads only; not a foundation model

claims.claim: Four Ropedia research directions are mapped honestly as direct, proxy, or diagnostic evidence.
claims.boundary: some directions remain proxy-only

claims.claim: Four extra direction probes are coded and evaluated.
claims.boundary: single-episode probes, not full research-direction solutions

claims.claim: Qwen3-Omni has a verified selected-episode held-out diagnostic pilot.
claims.boundary: the pipeline is verified, but model quality is weak: JSON validity is below target and action/subtask metrics are low

claims.claim: The next Qwen3-Omni step is structured-output and task-quality improvement on the same selected split.
claims.boundary: stronger model quality requires output-format improvements and action/subtask error analysis

claims.claim: Older pilot path strings are tracked as setup-file provenance.
claims.boundary: run/path identifiers stay separate from completed held-out-episode results

claims.claim: Prepared GitHub and Hugging Face mirrors carry matching critical data, visual, HTML, and validator files.
claims.boundary: compares prepared local mirror bundles before upload; live URLs are checked after publishing

claims.claim: The public GitHub and Hugging Face bundles contain the intended release files.
claims.boundary: checks public files, HF bundles, and current public-card assets; temporary local outputs are excluded

claims.claim: The public website has checked local references.
claims.boundary: checks local links, anchors, JSON data, and referenced images; external URLs are not fetched

claims.claim: The rendered website walkthrough has a browser-level interaction check.
claims.boundary: checks local page load, tab switch, walkthrough deep link, player controls, and console health

claims.claim: The release gate is explicit.
claims.boundary: summarizes packaging and live-mirror checks; cross-episode model quality is measured by later held-out reports

claims.claim: The live public mirrors are checked after upload.
claims.boundary: fetches public GitHub/HF URLs; it does not validate private training state

claims.claim: The project is externally citable and machine-readable.
claims.boundary: code license does not override original Xperience-10M dataset terms

claims.claim: A first-time reader has an explicit project path.
claims.boundary: guides inspection across data, tasks, results, and scale-up status

claims.claim: The core project artifacts are grouped for human reading and indexed with existence, size, and hash metadata where stable.
claims.boundary: selective source-of-truth catalog, not a complete inventory of every output file

claims.claim: The public reproduction path is documented with commands, expected outputs, and exact-match reproduction evidence.
claims.boundary: publicly reproduces the single-episode pipeline; multi-episode Qwen3-Omni metrics are added only after data preparation and held-out evaluation
